---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the limitation or pain point.

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Include API examples if possible:

```tsx
// How you'd like to use it
```

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## Additional Context

Anything else — screenshots, links to similar features in other libraries, etc.

---

> **Note:** If this is a major feature (new component, API change, or architectural change), a maintainer may ask you to write an [RFC](../../rfcs/README.md) before implementation begins.
